_doc: Phase 5.6 M-E S2/S3 allowlist. Each entry is a CLAUDE.md claim that lacks on-disk evidence and is cross-referenced to the M-A conformance audit. M-F cleared the final three docs-only naming-drift entries by rewriting CLAUDE.md to the canonical on-disk MCP IPC channel names.
_lifecycle: M-E ship: 9 entries. M-C restoration: backend rows deleted. M-D restoration: UI rows required no allowlist movement. M-F documentation truth-up: mcp.add/mcp.remove/mcp.health naming-drift rows deleted; allowlist is now intentionally empty. M-G runs strict mode as the ship gate.
